callbacks.name: action_cb
callbacks.disposition: length-delimited URL copied before launch; other strings consumed synchronously

callbacks.name: read_clipboard_cb
callbacks.disposition: libghostty request state remains live by callback contract; surface retained until completion; GTK text copied immediately

callbacks.name: confirm_read_clipboard_cb
callbacks.boundary: GLib main queue and prompt completion
callbacks.disposition: content copied synchronously; surface retained; request state returned only while retained request is live

callbacks.name: write_clipboard_cb
callbacks.boundary: GLib main queue and prompt completion
callbacks.disposition: matching text copied synchronously before queue hop; surface retained

result: No borrowed C string or array crosses an actor, GLib, or asynchronous callback boundary without a synchronous Swift-owned copy.
